parameters.query: SELECT c.characteristic_id, c.characteristic_name, c.name_ro, c.is_mandatory, c.type_id, c.allows_custom, COALESCE( json_agg( json_build_object('id', cv.value_id::text, 'name', cv.value_name) ORDER BY cv.value_name ) FILTER (WHERE cv.value_id IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json ) AS attr_values FROM catalogs.characteristics c LEFT JOIN catalogs.characteristic_values cv ON cv.marketplace = c.marketplace AND cv.characteristic_id = c.characteristic_id AND cv.is_active = true WHERE c.marketplace = $1 AND c.category_id = $2 AND c.is_active = true GROUP BY c.characteristic_id, c.characteristic_name, c.name_ro, c.is_mandatory, c.type_id, c.allows_custom ORDER BY c.is_mandatory DESC, c.characteristic_name;
